text: Being here, I am enveloped by the spirit of inquiry and anticipation. The sleek glass walls and carefully arranged furniture in the first room evoke a sense of order and structure, as if something important is about to unfold—an idea to be exchanged, a solution to be found. Moving into the R+D space, I feel a delicate optimism, fueled by the intention and aspiration visible in every object and word. There is an undercurrent of possibility—an invitation to imagine, to participate in the collective act of discovery. I am both humbled and energized, reminded of the ceaseless dance between what is and what could be.
